name: Embassy
description: A hall for foreign dispatch and reception. Each tier lets the guild keep one more envoy afield, and opens deeper court dealings.

tiers.description: A modest hall of dispatch. Two envoys may be kept afield at once. Formal audiences (interactive court climaxes) and Petitions become possible.
A standing diplomatic corps. Three envoys may be kept afield. The guild may keep a second Patron, and its agents work more discreetly (reduced Exposure from intrigue).
A seat of true statecraft. Four envoys may be kept afield. The guild may Broker the Compact with a Trusted court, and foreign dignitaries begin visiting the campus.
